top_items.title: Cost-Effective AI with Ollama, GKE GPU Sharing, and vCluster
top_items.one_liner: Optimize AI GPU costs and reduce complexity on GKE using Ollama and vCluster for shared GPU usage.

top_items.title: Make security simpler: Introducing the Google Cloud recommended security checklist
top_items.one_liner: A Google Cloud security checklist, inspired by MVSP, aids secure adoption of agentic AI and foundational cloud security.

top_items.title: Cloud CISO Perspectives: New AI threats report: Distillation, experimentation, and integration
top_items.one_liner: Google Threat Intelligence Group details new AI threats based on distillation, experimentation, and integration research.
